speaker: Command
message: All Units here Command. Civilian report of a brush fire along a wooded two-lane highway with traffic blocked near the roadway shoulder. Caller stated they stopped near a vehicle overturned close to the guardrail. Information is approximate. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Affirmative, responding toward the highway approach. Confirm best access route, or if both lanes are blocked by stopped traffic. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Unable to confirm; the call with the reporting civilian dropped before access details were obtained. Expect congestion on the highway and use caution near the tree-line fire and overturned vehicle. Finished
